instructions.name: add_liquidity
docs: Add liquidity (SOL) to a market in Prepare status

instructions.name: admin_close_market
docs: Admin-only: manually close a market with a specified result
Used for subjective markets or emergency resolution

instructions.name: claim
docs: Claim winnings from a resolved market
Winners receive proportional share of the FUT pool

accounts.name: user_fut_account
docs: User's FUT token account to receive winnings

accounts.name: market_fut_account
docs: Market's FUT token account holding the pool

accounts.name: user_position
docs: User position tracking their bets

accounts.name: user_winning_token_account
docs: User's winning token account (Yes or No token)

accounts.name: winning_token_mint
docs: The winning token mint (token_a for Yes, token_b for No)

instructions.name: create_bet
docs: Place a bet on a market by buying Yes or No tokens with FUT

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: CHECK reward YES/NO token mint

accounts.name: user_position
docs: User position account: tracks bets per user per market

instructions.name: get_res
docs: Query the oracle for the current price feed (legacy — use resolve_market for resolution)

instructions.name: init_market
docs: Create a new prediction market with Yes/No token mints

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the global state with fee settings and admin configuration

instructions.name: mint_token
docs: Mint Yes/No tokens to the market's PDA token accounts

instructions.name: resolve
docs: Resolve a market using Switchboard oracle data (admin only)
Checks that resolution_date has passed, reads oracle, determines winner

errors.name: StaleFeed
errors.msg: Switchboard feed has not been updated in 5 minutes

errors.name: ConfidenceIntervalExceeded
errors.msg: Switchboard feed exceeded provided confidence interval

errors.name: FutPriceBelowUnlockPrice
errors.msg: Current FUT price is not above Escrow unlock price.

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Invalid token mint for this market

errors.name: MarketNotFinished
errors.msg: Market is not in finished state

fields.name: total_fut_deposited
docs: Total FUT tokens deposited into the market via betting

fields.name: total_yes_sold
docs: Total number of Yes tokens sold to users

fields.name: total_no_sold
docs: Total number of No tokens sold to users

types.name: UserPosition
docs: Tracks an individual user's position in a specific market

fields.name: user
docs: The user who holds this position

fields.name: market
docs: The market this position belongs to

fields.name: yes_amount
docs: Total Yes tokens purchased

fields.name: no_amount
docs: Total No tokens purchased

fields.name: yes_fut_paid
docs: Total FUT paid for Yes tokens

fields.name: no_fut_paid
docs: Total FUT paid for No tokens

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether winnings have been claimed

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation
